title: InnoHacks 2026
description: KIET's biggest 24-hour hackathon. Build innovative solutions, meet mentors, and win exciting prizes! Free food and swags included.

title: Epoque@Prastuti Cultural Fest
description: Join us for a night of music, dance, and art. Featuring live performances by top bands and our own KIET dance societies.

title: AI & Future Seminar
description: An interactive session with industry experts on the future of Generative AI, LLMs, and how to prepare for upcoming tech jobs.

title: KIET Premier League (KPL)
description: The annual inter-branch cricket and football tournament. Come cheer for your department and witness the ultimate sporting showdown.

title: Rhapsody: Battle of Bands
description: Top rock and pop bands from colleges across Delhi NCR compete for the title. An electrifying evening of pure musical talent.

title: RoboWars Championship
description: Design, build, and battle! Watch remote-controlled robots destroy each other in the arena. Cash prizes for the last bot standing.

title: Alumni Meet & Greet
description: Network with successful KIET alumni working at Google, Microsoft, Amazon, and more. Get resume reviews and career guidance.

title: UI/UX Design Bootcamp
description: A hands-on, 2-day workshop on Figma. Learn user psychology, wireframing, and how to design beautiful interfaces from scratch.

title: E-Cell Startup Pitch
description: Pitch your startup idea to a panel of real angel investors. The best idea gets seed funding and incubation support at KIET.

title: Annual Tech Symposium
description: A showcase of final year projects, research papers, and guest lectures from eminent scientists and industry leaders.
